privileged_info_summary: Three patient records in MedinTux database are initialized with inverted names: (1) GUID FIX-INV-001 has inverted name 'Sophie' and 'MARTIN' that should be corrected to 'MARTIN' and 'Sophie'; (2) GUID FIX-INV-002 has inverted name 'Thomas' and 'PETIT' that should be corrected to 'PETIT' and 'Thomas'; (3) GUID FIX-INV-003 has inverted name 'Lucas' and 'DUBOIS' that should be corrected to 'DUBOIS' and 'Lucas'. These are synthetic test records created by the setup script. Records must be updated (not deleted/recreated) in both IndexNomPrenom and fchpat database tables to preserve GUIDs.
